title: IntentSpec
description: Structured interpretation of a user's photo+annotation+text request. All lengths in millimeters.

category.description: Wedge category guess; template_id null if freeform/long-tail.

description.description: One-sentence restatement of what the user wants, in plain English.

context_notes.description: Environment/function notes: load hints, outdoor/UV, moisture, heat.

critical.description: If true, may only commit from user_measured.

questions.description: Measurement/clarification prompts, each renderable as an overlay on the user's photo.

dim_name.description: For measure_mm: the dimension name. For choice: the enum template-param name it sets (e.g. load_hint), or null for material_suggestion.

suggested_value.description: For a choice question: the value the vision provider recommends. Used as the enum param proposal (below an answered choice, above the template default).

chosen_value.description: Filled in when the user answers a choice question. Never set by the provider.

overlay.description: Where to draw the arrow/circle on the photo (normalized 0-1 coords).
